mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, publish_time, publisher_id, publisher_name, remark, status, publisher_type) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{publishTime}, ''), NOW()), #{publisherId}, #{publisherName}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{publisherType})

INSERT INTO notice (title, content, publish_time, publisher_id, publisher_name, remark, status, publisher_type) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{publishTime}, ''), NOW()), #{publisherId}, #{publisherName}, #{remark}, 0, #{publisherType})

INSERT INTO notice_attachment (file_url, file_type, upload_time, notice_id) VALUES
(#{item.fileUrl}, #{item.fileType}, NOW(), #{item.noticeId})
mapper.select: SELECT n.*, na.attachment_id, na.file_url, na.file_type, na.upload_time FROM notice n LEFT JOIN notice_attachment na ON n.notice_id = na.notice_id WHERE n.notice_id = #{noticeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET status = 1 WHERE status = 0 AND publish_time <= NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notice_read WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND read_status = 1
SELECT * FROM notice_read WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND read_status = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_read (notice_id, residence_id, read_status, read_time) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{residenceId}, 1, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE read_time = NOW(), read_status = 1
mapper.select:
SELECT n.notice_id AS noticeId, n.title, n.publish_time AS publishTime, n.status AS status, COALESCE(COUNT(nr.id), 0) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nr.read_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS readCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nr.read_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unreadCount FROM notice n LEFT JOIN notice_read nr ON nr.notice_id = n.notice_id
AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
GROUP BY n.notice_id ORDER BY n.publish_time DESC
SELECT notice_id FROM notice WHERE status = 0 AND publish_time <= NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE notice_read SET read_status = #{readStatus}, read_time = CASE WHEN #{readStatus} = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE read_time END WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND residence_id = #{residenceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO notice_read (notice_id, residence_id, read_status) SELECT #{noticeId}, residence_id, 0 FROM user WHERE residence_id IS NOT NULL AND residence_id != '' GROUP BY residence_id
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM notice WHERE status = 1 AND DATE(publish_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT count(*) FROM notice WHERE status = 2
